          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="context-runner-block">
<h1>Context Runner Block<a class="headerlink" href="#context-runner-block" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>The Context block is a good way to run more complicated flows that depend on a value from an asynchronous source, like an API call or user input.</p>
<p>The Context block accepts a list of blocks, contextBlocks, a contextPath and a list of blocks, blocks.</p>
<p>The Context block is configured with two flows. The first flow, contextBlocks, is run first. Once the contextBlocks flow yields a result, the Context block runs the blocks flow, and blocks can load the value from the contextPath using a block like the Mapping block.</p>
<p>In the below example, Dropbox uploads are listed. The contextBlocks sub-flow gets a token from a auth0 block, and the blocks sub-flow uses the token to perform an authenticated request to Dropbox’s API, in this case, to list the users files from Dropbox.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;init&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;{ path: &#39;/uploads&#39; }&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;contextPath&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;dropboxAuth&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;contextBlocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;auth0&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;provider&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;dropbox&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;debug&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;showContext&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;post&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;notify&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;api.dropboxapi.com&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/2/files/list_folder&quot;</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;authentication&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;bearer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetters&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;jwt&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;context.dropboxAuth.access_token&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;debug&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;showContext&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.entries&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;grid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;gridOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The above example is from: <a class="reference external" href="https://app.kendra.io/dropbox/listUploads">https://app.kendra.io/dropbox/listUploads</a></p>
<section id="config-properties">
<h2>Config properties<a class="headerlink" href="#config-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>contextBlocks</strong>: A list of blocks to run first.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>contextPath</strong>: The path to save the contextBlocks output to.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong>: A list of blocks to run after the contextBlocks.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>skipFirst</strong>: If true, the contextBlocks are not ran on the first data event.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="see-also">
<h2>See also<a class="headerlink" href="#see-also" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><span class="xref std std-ref">context_block</span> - the more simple block for saving data to a context or state path directly.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="audio-player">
<h1>Audio player<a class="headerlink" href="#audio-player" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Play audio and with a waveform visual.
Can be used with web-money - the Web Monetization block that allows streaming micropayments.</p>
<section id="web-monetization-example-config">
<h2>Web Monetization example config:<a class="headerlink" href="#web-monetization-example-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;player&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;onPlay&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;web-money&quot;</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;onPause&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;web-money&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabled&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="required-property">
<h2>Required property<a class="headerlink" href="#required-property" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>Requires a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">url</span></code> parameter string to an audio resource URL.</p>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="csv-export">
<h1>CSV Export<a class="headerlink" href="#csv-export" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p><strong>Deprecated, use the separate serialize and file output blocks</strong></p>
<p>Export data to a CSV file. Input data can be one of:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>An array of arrays</p></li>
<li><p>An array of objects</p></li>
<li><p>An object explicitly defining fields and data</p></li>
</ul>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;csv-export&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;skipEmptyLines&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>quotes: false (or array of booleans)</p></li>
<li><p>quoteChar: ‘”’</p></li>
<li><p>escapeChar: ‘”’</p></li>
<li><p>delimiter: “,”</p></li>
<li><p>header: true</p></li>
<li><p>newline: “rn”</p></li>
<li><p>skipEmptyLines: false (or ‘greedy’)</p></li>
<li><p>columns: null (or array of strings)</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="set-variable">
<h1>Set Variable<a class="headerlink" href="#set-variable" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Save a value to local storage.</p>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>name</strong>: The name of the variable</p></li>
<li><p><strong>showNotify</strong> (boolean) (default=true): Display a notification that the variable has been set</p></li>
<li><p><strong>nameGetter</strong> : Provide a location for the variable name</p></li>
<li><p><strong>valueGetter</strong>: Provide a location for the variable value</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;variable-set&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;[VARIABLE_NAME]&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="data-grid">
<h1>Data Grid<a class="headerlink" href="#data-grid" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>This block displays the data passed in as a rich data table using the flexible grid library ag-grid.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;grid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;gridOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;{}&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;passThrough&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;false&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;firstRowHeaders&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;false&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>sizeColumnsToFit</strong> (boolean) (default = true) - set this to false to disable the auto-size algorithm from running that will resize the columns after display to best fit the available space.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>gridOptions</strong> (object) - Add supported options for the grid, based on the grid properties listed here: <a class="reference external" href="https://www.ag-grid.com/javascript-grid-properties/">https://www.ag-grid.com/javascript-grid-properties/</a></p></li>
<li><p><strong>columnDefs</strong> (array) - A list of columns to display in the grid. The supported options are based on the grid column properties documented here: <a class="reference external" href="https://www.ag-grid.com/javascript-grid-column-properties/">https://www.ag-grid.com/javascript-grid-column-properties/</a></p></li>
<li><p><strong>passThrough</strong> (boolean) - always pass through changes to data model, rather than emiting new changes based on selected rows</p></li>
<li><p><strong>firstRowHeaders</strong> (boolean) - Use the first row as column headers</p></li>
<li><p><strong>enabledGetter</strong> (string) - A JMESpath string that returns true or false. When false, the grid will be disabled.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>valueGetter</strong> (string) - A JMESpath expression that will define the source of the data to use for the grid. This will allow the grid to display data at any data location, including state.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="using-valuegetter">
<h2>Using valueGetter<a class="headerlink" href="#using-valuegetter" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>The valueGetter property changes the behaviour of the datagrid. Instead of simply rendering data,
the grid will render the result of a JMESpath expression capable of addressing data, context and state.</p>
<p><strong>Caution:</strong> using a valueGetter this property will trigger an update on every state change. This may have performance implications.
Using this property in conjunction with <em>passThrough</em> could also potentially cause execution loops or unexpected behaviour.</p>
<section id="example">
<h3>Example<a class="headerlink" href="#example" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;grid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;gridOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;passThrough&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;firstRowHeaders&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;state.global._.flags&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabledGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;state.global._.flags.devel&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;columnDefs&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Flag&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Value&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="advanced-features">
<h2>Advanced features<a class="headerlink" href="#advanced-features" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>Adding <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&quot;cellRenderer&quot;:</span> <span class="pre">&quot;workflowRenderer&quot;</span></code> to a column allows to embed workflow within a cell of the table.
The <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">cellRendererParams</span></code> should include <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">blocks</span></code> as an array of workflow tasks to be added to the cell. Examples of
use include adding an “Operations” column, using the “actions” task within the cell to add a list of buttons to operate
on the data from that row. The cell will be passed in data from that row of the grid only.</p>
<section id="examples">
<h3>Examples<a class="headerlink" href="#examples" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>This example shows some advanced grid features, such as customisation of the
pagination, multiple row selection, the addition of a selectable checkbox column,
and the use of the “workflow renderer” to embed another workflow within
the grid cells. For example, the workflow renderer is useful for adding edit buttons
to a content administration table.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;grid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;gridOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;pagination&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;paginationPageSize&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;rowSelection&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;multiple&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;columnDefs&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;width&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;resizable&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;checkboxSelection&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;ID&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Operations&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;cellRenderer&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;workflowRenderer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;cellRendererParams&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;actions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;buttons&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;View&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;dialog&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;debug&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;actions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="nt">&quot;buttons&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                          </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;OK&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;init&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                              </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">                          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Edit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;launch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;example&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;workflowId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;editTheThing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.id&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>This example shows filters, checkbox selection, pagination, and valueFormatter
options in use:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;grid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;gridOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;pagination&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;paginationPageSize&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;rowSelection&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;multiple&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;columnDefs&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerCheckboxSelection&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;width&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;resizable&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;checkboxSelection&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Description&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Description&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;agTextColumnFilter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filterParams&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;applyButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;resetButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Department&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Department&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;agTextColumnFilter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filterParams&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;applyButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;resetButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Size / Weight&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Size / Weight&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;agTextColumnFilter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filterParams&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;applyButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;resetButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;headerName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Price&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;field&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Price&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;width&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">150</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;agNumberColumnFilter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueFormatter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;join(&#39;&#39;, [&#39;£&#39;, value])&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;filterParams&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;applyButton&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>

  <section id="web-money">
<span id="id1"></span><h1>Web Money<a class="headerlink" href="#web-money" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Web Monetization block that allows streaming micropayments.
Can be used with the Player block.</p>
<section id="web-monetization-example-config">
<h2>Web Monetization example config:<a class="headerlink" href="#web-monetization-example-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;player&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;onPlay&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;web-money&quot;</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;onPause&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;web-money&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabled&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="data-input">
<h2>Data input<a class="headerlink" href="#data-input" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>To setup Web Monetization with a payment pointer, a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">paymentPointer</span></code> property should be provided in data input.
A non existant paymentPointer will remove any existing Web Monetization stream.</p>
</section>
<section id="config">
<h2>Config<a class="headerlink" href="#config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>showPaymentPointer - a boolean to show the Interledger payment pointer, currently true by default but could change.</p>
<p>showPaymentTotal - a boolean to show payment total infomation. currently true by default but could change.</p>
<p>fiatCurrency - used convert an estimated value of the total payment amount to a fiat currency (e.g: USD, EUR)</p>
<p>payTotalTitle - a heading for the payment total</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Customisable messaging config:</dt><dd><ul class="simple">
<li><p>paymentActiveMessage</p></li>
<li><p>paymentPausedMessage</p></li>
<li><p>supportFoundMessage</p></li>
<li><p>supportMissingMessage</p></li>
<li><p>paymentActiveMessage</p></li>
<li><p>paymentPausedMessage</p></li>
<li><p>supportFoundMessage</p></li>
<li><p>supportMissingMessage</p></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="message">
<h1>Message<a class="headerlink" href="#message" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Display a customisable message based on the current data modal values.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>title</strong> - (optional) text to be styled as a title</p></li>
<li><p><strong>message</strong> - (optional) text to be styled as a normal paragraph</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="http-request">
<h1>HTTP Request<a class="headerlink" href="#http-request" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Get, put or post data to an external HTTP endpoint.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;jsonplaceholder.typicode.com&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/posts&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;query&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;userId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;useProxy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>method</strong> - REQUIRED - allowed values are get, put, post, and delete.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>useProxy</strong> (boolean) (default = false) - Set to true to use a proxy. Useful for CORS. Proxy setting are set at <a class="reference external" href="https://app.kendra.io/core/settings">https://app.kendra.io/core/settings</a></p></li>
<li><p><strong>notify</strong> (boolean) (default = true) -  Show a notification message if the request is successful. This message is not
sent when the HTTP method is GET, but can be turned on and off for POST, PUT, and DELETE requests by using this
property.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>headers</strong> - A set of headers with header name as object key. Values are processed by JMESpath</p></li>
<li><p><strong>endpoint</strong> - The request endpoint. Can take multiple forms. See below.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>onError</strong> - Define an array of blocks to show when there is an error processing the HTTP request.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="examples">
<h2>Examples<a class="headerlink" href="#examples" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p><strong>Default</strong> For simple requests, the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">endpoint</span></code> can just be a simple string:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https://covid19.mathdro.id/api&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;useProxy&quot;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Dynamic data</strong> If the endpoint needs to be constructed from data, the endpoint can be specified as an object with a “valueGetter” attribute.
“valueGetter” can only get data from the context.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;context.saved&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;api.harvestapp.com/api/v2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/reports/time/tasks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetters&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;query&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;{ from: context.savedData.from, to: context.savedData.to }&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Headers</strong>
For advanced use cases, the payload can be constructed using a JMES Path expression.
JMESPath expressions can be used to dynamically set header and payload values.
Caution: if the header value is a string, it must use two types of quotes: double and single quotes, like “payload”: “‘grant_type=client_credentials’”.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;post&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;accounts.spotify.com&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/api/token&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;payload&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&#39;grant_type=client_credentials&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;headers&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;Content-Type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&#39;application/x-www-form-urlencoded&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;Authorization&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;join(&#39;&#39;, [&#39;Basic &#39;, btoa(join(&#39;&#39;, [data.client_id, &#39;:&#39;, data.client_secret]))])&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>GraphQL</strong> It is possible to query a GraphQL endpoint using the HTTP block.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;post&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;notify&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;valnet.lurker.dev&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/api/graphql&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;payload&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;{ query: &#39;query ($token: String) {  viewer(token: $token) {    allCommitments {      id      action      plannedStart      committedOn      due      committedQuantity {        numericValue        unit {          name        }      }      note      resourceClassifiedAs {        name        category      }      involves {        id        resourceClassifiedAs {          name          category        }        trackingIdentifier      }      provider {        id        name      }      receiver {        id        name      }      inputOf {        id        name      }      outputOf {        id        name      }      scope {        id        name      }      plan {        id        name      }      isPlanDeliverable      forPlanDeliverable {        id        action        outputOf {          name        }      }      isDeletable    }  }}&#39;, variables: { token: context.vfAuth } }&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>onError</strong> To debug and display an error message</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;http&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;method&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;endpoint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;host&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;accounts.spotify.com&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;/api/token&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;onError&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;debug&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;showData&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;showContext&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;showState&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;card&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Error with submission:&lt;p&gt;{{data.error.error}} - {{data.error.error_description}}&lt;/p&gt;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="pagination">
<h2>Pagination<a class="headerlink" href="#pagination" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>If a HTTP API returns paginated results with a standard link header, to fetch paginated API results, set the followPaginationLinksMerged option to true. This will fetch all pages of results and return the combined set of results from all the pages.</p>
<p>With a proxy:
<a href="#id1"><span class="problematic" id="id2">``</span></a><a href="#id3"><span class="problematic" id="id4">`</span></a>json
{</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>“type”: “http”,
“method”: “GET”,
“endpoint”: “<a class="reference external" href="https://example.com/paginated">https://example.com/paginated</a>”,
“useProxy”: true,
“followPaginationLinksMerged”: true</p>
</div></blockquote>
<section id="id5">
<h3>}<a class="headerlink" href="#id5" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
</section>
</section>
</section>

          <a href="../../index.html">Kendraio App</a>

        <div class="rst-content style-external-links">
          <div role="navigation" aria-label="Page navigation">
  <ul class="wy-breadcrumbs">
      <li><a href="../../index.html" class="icon icon-home" aria-label="Home"></a></li>
      <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Debug</li>
      <li class="wy-breadcrumbs-aside">
            <a href="../../_sources/workflow/blocks/debug.rst.txt" rel="nofollow"> View page source</a>
      </li>
  </ul>
  <hr/>
</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="debug">
<h1>Debug<a class="headerlink" href="#debug" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Output the current data model values and list available contextual values.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;debug&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;open&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;showData&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;showContext&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;showStat&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>

<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>open (number) (default = 1): how many levels of debug output to show by default.</p></li>
<li><p>showData (default = true): Set this to false to hide the display of the primary data</p></li>
<li><p>showContext (default = false): This defaults to false, in which case only output the input data into the debug
block is shown. Set this to true to enable debugging of context values too.</p></li>
<li><p>showState (default = false): Set this to true to enable to display of state.</p></li>
<li><p>enabledGetter : When set the enabledGetter should contain a JMESPath expression that returns true/false to enable or disable the debug block.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="mermaid">
<h1>Mermaid<a class="headerlink" href="#mermaid" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Create diagrams and visualisations from text using Mermaid.
<a class="reference external" href="https://mermaid-js.github.io/">https://mermaid-js.github.io/</a></p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-javascript notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nx">type</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;mermaid&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nx">graphGetter</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;data&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nx">type</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;graph&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nx">direction</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="s1">&#39;TB&#39;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>graphGetter</strong> - a JMESPath expression specifying where to look for graph data</p></li>
<li><p><strong>diagramType</strong> - the type of diagram to create, one of <cite>graph</cite>, <cite>flow</cite>, <cite>class</cite>, <cite>sequence</cite></p></li>
<li><p><strong>diagramDirection</strong> - the direction of the diagram, one of <cite>TB</cite>, <cite>LR</cite>, <cite>BT</cite>, <cite>RL</cite></p></li>
<li><p><strong>svgId</strong> - the ID of the SVG element to render to, required if there are multiple diagrams in the same page</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="graph-definition-format">
<h2>Graph definition format<a class="headerlink" href="#graph-definition-format" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>Mermaid graph data can be provided as strings, arrays or objects. If the renderer finds an array, it will
join all values into a newline separated string. If the renderer finds an object, it will join all the object values,
and ignore any keys.</p>
<p>The following are equivalent:
* “A –&gt; B;  B –&gt; C ; B –&gt; D”
* [“A –&gt; B”, “B –&gt; C”,”B –&gt; D”]
* {“one”: “A –&gt; B”, “two”: “B –&gt; C”,”three”: “B –&gt; D”}</p>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>
          <footer>

</footer>

      </li>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="switch">
<h1>Switch<a class="headerlink" href="#switch" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>The switch block is used to conditionally run workflows based on evaluation of input value.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;switch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;cases&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>valueGetter</strong> - JMESPath to evaluate against incoming data to get value for comparison</p></li>
<li><p><strong>cases</strong> (default = []) - an array of cases, each case contains:</p>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>value</strong> - the value that must match for this case to run</p></li>
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong> - the workflow items that are run when this case matches</p></li>
<li><p><strong>valueGetter</strong> (optional) - a JMESPath expression to evaluate which is used to compare and select the appropriate case. Only the specified case that matches the evaluated expression will be run. If a valueGetter expression is not provided then the input data is used as the value to match against.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>default</strong> - object contains one key:</p>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong> - the array of workflow items to run if no cases match</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="notes">
<h2>Notes<a class="headerlink" href="#notes" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>The comparison made to select the branch is that it’s the first branch where value === matchValue - where value is the value defined in the branch, and matchValue is the result of valueGetter , and === is the JavaScript “strict equality”.</p>
<p>If you are looking to perform a test against a more variable value, you will need to use a more complex expression in the initial valueGetter.</p>
<blockquote>
<div><div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>(test &amp;&amp; value) || (otherTest &amp;&amp; someOtherValue)
</pre></div>
</div>
</div></blockquote>
</section>
</section>

    <section data-toggle="wy-nav-shift" class="wy-nav-content-wrap"><nav class="wy-nav-top" aria-label="Mobile navigation menu" >

      <div class="wy-nav-content">
        <div class="rst-content style-external-links">
          <div role="navigation" aria-label="Page navigation">
  <ul class="wy-breadcrumbs">
      <li><a href="../../index.html" class="icon icon-home" aria-label="Home"></a></li>
      <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Batch Process</li>
      <li class="wy-breadcrumbs-aside">
            <a href="../../_sources/workflow/blocks/batch.rst.txt" rel="nofollow"> View page source</a>
      </li>
  </ul>
  <hr/>
</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="batch-process">
<h1>Batch Process<a class="headerlink" href="#batch-process" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Run the specified workflow for every item in a list. This block expects an array (list) of items to be passed in as data.
It will run the embedded workflow for every item in the list, collect the results, and then output the list of results once all the tasks have completed.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;batch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong> (array) - the workflow (list of blocks) to run for each item in the input data list.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>flex</strong> (boolean) (default = false) - apply a flex layout to the batch workflow outputs.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="examples">
<h2>Examples<a class="headerlink" href="#examples" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<section id="cards-gallery-layout">
<h3>Cards Gallery Layout<a class="headerlink" href="#cards-gallery-layout" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>One helpful application of the Batch Block is to act as a container, allowing the child items to have distinct layouts.
A common way to use the Batch Block is in conjunction with the Cards Block. When providing the Batch Block with an array of Card Block and configuring <cite>flex: true</cite>, it will produce a gallery-style layout.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1">// Data</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;iPhone Charger fast charging&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;imageUrl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://img.fruugo.com/product/4/36/728056364_max.jpg&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;Wireless On-Ear Headphones&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;imageUrl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61WQ0mBtBYL._AC_SL1500_.jpg&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;Magnetic Wireless Charger Fast&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;imageUrl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51ZTUXXpT1L._AC_SL1500_.jpg&quot;</span><span class="err">`</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;batch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;flex&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;card&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="nt">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;h3&gt;{{data.title}}&lt;/h3&gt;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="nt">&quot;template&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;img width=&#39;200&#39; height=&#39;300&#39; src=&#39;{{data.imageUrl}}&#39; /&gt;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
</section>
