</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="parse-data">
<h1>Parse Data<a class="headerlink" href="#parse-data" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Process incoming data as JSON, CSV, or XML.</p>
<p>This block expects the incoming data to contain at least the following keys. These match the output of the File Input block so the two can be easily chained together:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>type</strong>  - the MIME type of the incoming data, must match one of the supported parse formats.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>content</strong> - the text content to parse and extract data from.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>The correct format for parsing is selected based on the incoming type. If the incoming data does not contain a “type” attribute, AND it is of string type, then it may be parsed with automatic detection of the type. The automatic detection works like this:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Is the input data a string? No - do nothing and stop parsing</p></li>
<li><p>Does the string start with a “{“ character? Yes - attempt to parse as JSON data</p></li>
<li><p>Does the string start with a “&lt;” character? Yes - attempt to parse as XML data</p></li>
<li><p>Otherwise - attempt to parse as CSV.</p></li>
</ul>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;parse-data&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;csvOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;skipEmptyLines&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;xmlOptions&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>

<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>csvOptions</strong> - configuration options to pass along to the CSV parser. This can include:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>header</strong> (default = false): Set this to true and then the first row of parsed data will be interpreted as field names</p></li>
<li><p><strong>skipEmptyLines</strong> (default = false): If true, lines that are completely empty (those which evaluate to an empty string) will be skipped. If set to ‘greedy’, lines that don’t have any content (those which have only whitespace after parsing) will also be skipped.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Most of the other config properties can be omitted, as the default values will automatically detect the correct settings to use from the imported CSV file. Other supported properties:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>delimiter</strong> (default = “”): Leave blank to auto-detect from a list of most common delimiters, or any values passed in through delimitersToGuess</p></li>
<li><p><strong>newline</strong> (default = “”): Leave blank to auto-detect. Must be one of r, n, or rn.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>quoteChar</strong> (default = ‘”’)  The character used to quote fields. The quoting of all fields is not mandatory. Any field which is not quoted will correctly read.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>escapeChar</strong>: ‘”’,</p></li>
<li><p><strong>dynamicTyping</strong> (default = false): If true, numeric and boolean data will be converted to their type instead of remaining strings.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>preview</strong>: 0 - if greater than 0 then only this many lines will be read</p></li>
<li><p><strong>delimitersToGuess</strong>: [‘,’, ‘t’, ‘|’, ‘;’]</p></li>
<li><p><strong>xmlOptions</strong> - options to pass along to the XML parser</p></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

<li class="toctree-l1"><a class="reference internal" href="variable_set.html">Set Variable</a></li>
<li class="toctree-l1"><a class="reference internal" href="web_money.html">Web Money</a></li>
<li class="toctree-l1"><a class="reference internal" href="wallet.html">Wallet</a></li>
</ul>
<p class="caption" role="heading"><span class="caption-text">Automated testing</span></p>
<ul>
<li class="toctree-l1"><a class="reference internal" href="../../testing/tips.html">Notes for Cypress testing</a></li>
</ul>

        </div>
      </div>
    </nav>

    <section data-toggle="wy-nav-shift" class="wy-nav-content-wrap"><nav class="wy-nav-top" aria-label="Mobile navigation menu" >
          <i data-toggle="wy-nav-top" class="fa fa-bars"></i>
          <a href="../../index.html">Kendraio App</a>
      </nav>

      <div class="wy-nav-content">
        <div class="rst-content style-external-links">
          <div role="navigation" aria-label="Page navigation">
  <ul class="wy-breadcrumbs">
      <li><a href="../../index.html" class="icon icon-home" aria-label="Home"></a></li>
      <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Reference</li>
      <li class="wy-breadcrumbs-aside">
            <a href="../../_sources/workflow/blocks/reference.rst.txt" rel="nofollow"> View page source</a>
      </li>
  </ul>
  <hr/>
</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="reference">
<h1>Reference<a class="headerlink" href="#reference" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>This block presents a select widget that takes it’s options from the data input.
It expects to receive an array of options, and shows a drop-down select list where
one of the options can be selected. The selected option is output as the data from
this block.</p>
<section id="examples">
<h2>Examples<a class="headerlink" href="#examples" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>Here is an example showing most of the possible configuration values:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;reference&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;fieldLabel&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Select artist&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;labelGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueField&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;outputGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;@&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Instead of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">labelGetter</span></code> the label can be taken from a field of the input
data using <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">labelField</span></code>. The label field defaults to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">label</span></code> so if the
input data items have a field called <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">label</span></code> you can omit these options.</p>
<p>You can also set the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">required</span></code> status of the input select list. This defaults
to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">false</span></code>.</p>
</section>
</section>


           </div>
          </div>

        <div class="rst-content style-external-links">
          <div role="navigation" aria-label="Page navigation">
  <ul class="wy-breadcrumbs">
      <li><a href="../../index.html" class="icon icon-home" aria-label="Home"></a></li>
      <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Launch</li>
      <li class="wy-breadcrumbs-aside">
            <a href="../../_sources/workflow/blocks/launch_block.rst.txt" rel="nofollow"> View page source</a>
      </li>
  </ul>
  <hr/>
</div>
          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="launch">
<h1>Launch<a class="headerlink" href="#launch" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Useful to jump to a different Flow. This block is not available to be added to a flow directly, but is instead for use from within other blocks.</p>
<p>If you want to jump to a different Flow from a button the <a class="reference internal" href="link_action_block.html"><span class="doc">Link Action Block</span></a>, allows opening Flows in a new tab or window as an alternative to an <a class="reference internal" href="actions.html"><span class="doc">Actions block button</span></a> being used with a Launch block.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;launch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;workflowId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>adapter</strong> - The adapter of the flow to launch</p></li>
<li><p><strong>workflowId</strong> - The flow to launch</p></li>
<li><p><strong>valueGetters</strong> - An onbject containing JMESPath to evaluate for adapter and workflowId.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>context</strong> - Data that will be passed to the flow to launch</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="dynamic-config">
<h2>Dynamic config<a class="headerlink" href="#dynamic-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;launch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;valueGetters&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">     </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.adapterName&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">     </span><span class="nt">&quot;workflowId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.id&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="with-context">
<h2>With context<a class="headerlink" href="#with-context" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;launch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;schemas&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;workflowId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;edit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.uuid&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="rename-fields">
<h1>Rename Fields<a class="headerlink" href="#rename-fields" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>The rename fields block uses mappings to convert one data format to another.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-javascript notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">   </span><span class="nx">type</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;rename-fields&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">   </span><span class="nx">mapping</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">     </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">       </span><span class="nx">source</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;SourceField&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">       </span><span class="nx">target</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;TargetField&#39;</span>
<span class="w">     </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">   </span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="w">   </span><span class="nx">mappingGetter</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;data.something&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">   </span><span class="nx">inputGetter</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;data&#39;</span>
<span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<blockquote>
<div><ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>mapping</strong>  an array of objects defining a mapping of from -&gt; to fields {source: &lt;string&gt;, target: &lt;string&gt;}</p></li>
<li><p><strong>mappingGetter</strong>  a JMESPath expression to get the mapping from the input data</p></li>
<li><p><strong>inputGetter</strong>  (required) a JMESPath expression to get the source data</p></li>
</ul>
<p>mappingGetter overrides mapping.</p>
</div></blockquote>
</section>
<section id="json-schema">
<h2>JSON Schema<a class="headerlink" href="#json-schema" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>The rename fields functionality requires data that has been saved according to this schema.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;inputFile&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Example source file&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;targetSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Target schema&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;presetName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Preset name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;description&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;A name for this mapping preset so it can be identified during import operations.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;fieldMappings&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;array&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;items&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                    </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="nt">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Destination&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;enum&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">                            </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="nt">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="nt">&quot;enum&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                            </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">                        </span><span class="p">}</span>

<span class="w">                    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>

           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="form">
<h1>Form<a class="headerlink" href="#form" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Display a form for data entry or editing.</p>
<p>Forms are displayed based on the UI Schema and JSON Schema provided. These can be provided inline within the block configuration, or loaded from an adapter.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>jsonSchema</strong>: the data model for which to generate the form</p></li>
<li><p><strong>uiSchema</strong>: the UI Schema for customisation of the form. This is used to add further options to the form that are beyond what is allowed in JSON schema, such as customising widget types, labels, and widget options.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>adapter</strong> and <strong>formId</strong>: if these two properties are provided they are used to fetch the JSON schema and UI Schema from the adapter config repository.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>label</strong> (default = “Submit): customise the label displayed on the submit button</p></li>
<li><p><strong>hasSubmit</strong> (default = true): this allows you to remove the submit button from the form. If this is set to true the submit button is not displayed and the form will output all changes.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>debounceTime</strong> (default = 400): the number of milliseconds to debounce form output when not using a submit button. Multiple changes within this time will be ignored, and only the last change is emitted. This is a useful option to prevent unnecessary execution of multiple tasks within the workflow, for example if the form feeds into a HTTP block to pull data from an API (such as in an autocomplete) then the debounce will limit the number of requests that are sent while the user is entering input.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>emitOnInit</strong> (boolean) (default = false): enable this to emit the form values when the block is initialised. This is useful if you need to pass on default values.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>schemaGetter</strong>: Form schemas can be made dynamic by providing a set of blocks that will generate a schema.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>contextErrorKey</strong> (default = null): the key used to store the error message in the context. This is useful if you want to display the error message in a different block.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="uischema-properties">
<h2>uiSchema properties<a class="headerlink" href="#uischema-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>items</strong>: Wrapped round a field’s properties to denote that it accepts input of more than one value.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>ui:widget</strong>: The functionality that uiSchema will provide, for example “blocks” for a nested Flow or “password” to hide user input with asterisks.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>blocksConfig</strong>: A container for a nested block or Flow.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>adapterName</strong>: The adapter of the Flow to be used as a gosub.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>workflowId</strong>: The ID of the Flow to be used as a gosub.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong>: The blocks to nest in the form field. This should be an array, even if it is a single item.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>type</strong>: The type of block to be used.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="important-notes-on-creating-flows-with-forms">
<h2>Important notes on creating flows with forms<a class="headerlink" href="#important-notes-on-creating-flows-with-forms" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>When a form is submitted, it will trigger the execution of the next block in the flow, passing through any new data.
Blocks will continue to pass processing through the flow, until a block emits the same data as it did previously -
at which point the change detection will stop the flow.</p>
<p>If you are creating flows that need to respond to new data from the forms, you will need to pay attention to the blocks
that follow the form, making sure that every block emits changes to that processing continues. If you have blocks that are
not dependent on the form, then it is best to place them before the form in the flow.</p>
</section>
<section id="config-init">
<h2>Config init<a class="headerlink" href="#config-init" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>The initial configuration will result in an empty form.
The fields of the form can be populated in two ways: manually writing fields or dynamically generating fields from given data.</p>
<p>Here’s an example of creating a form by manually writing fields and configuring it:</p>
<p>}</p>
<section id="dynamic-data-and-field-titles">
<h3>Dynamic data and field titles<a class="headerlink" href="#dynamic-data-and-field-titles" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>To generate fields form given data, the data needs to be in a format readable by the form block.
It is possible to transform the data into the format that the form expects with the help of a mapping block.
Is also possible to use generated data to dynamically display the title of a field</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1">// generated data</span>
<span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`Joh</span><span class="kc">n</span><span class="err">`</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;surname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">`Doe`</span>
<span class="p">}</span>

<span class="c1">// Form config</span>
<span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;I am harcoded text&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;user_name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;The title of this field comes from dynamic data&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;user_surname&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;surname&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;The title of this field comes from dynamic data&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>}</p>
</section>
<section id="read-only">
<h3>Read-only<a class="headerlink" href="#read-only" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>Display a field in read-only mode (not editable)</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Search&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Artist name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;readOnly&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="no-submit-button">
<h3>No submit button<a class="headerlink" href="#no-submit-button" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>A simple search form without a submit button.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;hasSubmit&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;emitOnInit&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;term&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Search term&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;displayHidden&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;boolean&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Show hidden&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="using-a-schemagetter">
<h3>Using a schemaGetter<a class="headerlink" href="#using-a-schemagetter" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>The simplest way to use a schemaGetter is the load-schema block.
<span class="xref std std-ref">load_schema</span>
The load-schema block can turn an object generated by the schema builder into a JSON schema, and can combine multiple existing schemas.</p>
<div class="highlight-javascript notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Save&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;hasSubmit&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;schemaGetter&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;load-schema&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="s2">&quot;adapterName&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;schemas&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="s2">&quot;schemaGetter&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;context.schema &amp;&amp; context.schema.name&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>If a schema has already been loaded, then a mapping block could be used to grab from data.</p>
<div class="highlight-javascript notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Save Preset&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;schemaGetter&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;data.form&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="using-data-saved-from-context-blocks">
<h2>Using data saved from context blocks<a class="headerlink" href="#using-data-saved-from-context-blocks" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>JSON Schema supports references to transclude content.
Context is injected into a definitions section, that references can use.
In the example below, a mapping has a default value, which is saved using the context block, and the default value is set to “injected”.</p>
<div class="highlight-javascript notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;mapping&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;`{ \&quot;type\&quot;: \&quot;string\&quot;,\n    \&quot;default\&quot;:\&quot;injected\&quot;\n}`&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;context-save&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;key&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;saved&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="s2">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="s2">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="s2">&quot;test_property&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="s2">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;#/definitions/context/saved&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="s2">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="password-fields">
<h2>Password Fields<a class="headerlink" href="#password-fields" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>You can use uiSchema to designate a password field.
The below example will render a form that displays only * for each character entered in the “password” field.</p>
<p>You can see this working <a class="reference external" href="https://app.kendra.io/workflow-builder?data=NobwRALgngDgpmAXGAlgOxRMBfANOaeJMANwEMAnFMgIwBs4BaAczi1zDTIFsFkBnMmgAmNAPYAPAIIBXCAAsc+SLD5huZGDHTMwHDVp3FhZCGQAEAH0vmABiGy2lBVcQBmYitz1g6tOHTEAMJiaGhwAMbsYABW-KEAyhHycBpILkTIYjQxkdEwFGLwFBAocPzpYDL8cBRcvJWEavwQVGi6HKUQDMQAqjV1PAgcwnBuZDJ0WMhKYDBk--UyeHzQ+nIRkQAD6aEmdBrpn9EDEkrQbf05UErGIADUyN2nXK0OYAGKyhj45Qd5DkKi0BjwtgMoY4oSiSSyI3YAC6QA">here</a>.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Connect&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;username&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Username&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;password&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Password&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;password&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;ui:widget&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;password&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="nested-blocks">
<h2>Nested blocks<a class="headerlink" href="#nested-blocks" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>You can insert or “nest” another block within a form through the use of uiSchema.
First specify your nested block’s position in the jsonSchema using the property key of your choice.
Then you can define the schema’s content in the form block with your chosen key,
within the enclosing “uiSchema” property.</p>
<p>The below example inserts an array of blocks into the form. Each block displays a simple message.</p>
<p>You can see this example working <a class="reference external" href="https://app.kendra.io/workflow-builder?data=NobwRALgngDgpmAXGAZgewE4FswBowA2AhgEZwFJgDKAriVgJYR5gBWAzmgHZUDGAFnCxEk4GBjTwMEBnHajIRDAHM4EAPrjJcaVAXR4ldhAwMuyljIgEEyAJpoaAAgDu3AOQQn7OHCcR+BnYnAFonJlcGAgInMic0ADcdUwATFLguWKgnGgY+QWEwAF8S-Fz8oRFEcAglVQ0tKWgFXMQXBhT6yhICNF4Aa3l8Hr7BgGFuFAYLarARgflEUEhYWzAsOXYiVUsmG0oAQScN9i2dotwa1coTs4R8K33kA640AJ1jze2EC6vDZFu3121jWdjUTiIr3eGE+pyBRQAuiULnNegMJlgNlxmMhigigA">here</a>.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Submit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;target_property&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;You won&#39;t see this - it will be overridden by uiSchema&quot;</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;target_property&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;ui:widget&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocksConfig&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;A message&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Another message&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                      </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Yet another message&quot;</span>
<span class="w">                  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>}</p>
</section>
<section id="nested-flows">
<h2>Nested flows<a class="headerlink" href="#nested-flows" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>If you want to update a field value according to a user action, you can achieve this with a nested flow.</p>
<p>Any flow can be nested in any other flow. The nested flow has access to the main flow’s data object,
context and state - it can use any data stored here.
The nested flow’s output is then passed to the main flow’s data object, just like the output of a conventional block.</p>
<p>The nested flow’s configuration does not appear within the main flow.
Instead, it can be edited directly with Kendraio App if opened from the Flow Cloud, just as you would edit the main flow.
Any saved changes will be reflected immediately when the main flow is refreshed.</p>
<p>This example flow allows the user to search and select from a menu based on returned data.
The Venue Name field expects a single value and the Lineup field can handle several values.</p>
<p>The nested flow is denoted by the property <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&quot;type&quot;:</span> <span class="pre">&quot;gosub&quot;</span></code>. You can read more about gosubs <a class="reference internal" href="gosub.html"><span class="doc">here</span></a>.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;form&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Update Event&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Update Event&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;jsonSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;venue_name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Venue Name&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;lineup&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;array&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Lineup&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;items&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;number&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;bio&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;string&quot;</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;uiSchema&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;venue_name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;ui:widget&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocksConfig&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapterName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;bandsintown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;card&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Search and select venue:&quot;</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;gosub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapterName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;bandsintown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">                </span><span class="nt">&quot;workflowId&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;findVenue&quot;</span>
<span class="w">              </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;lineup&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;items&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;ui:widget&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocksConfig&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">          </span><span class="nt">&quot;adapterName&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;bandsintown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>

           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="get-variable">
<h1>Get Variable<a class="headerlink" href="#get-variable" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Fetch a value from local storage.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;variable-get&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;[VARIABLE_NAME]&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>

  <ul class="wy-breadcrumbs">

  <hr/>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="card">
<h1>Card<a class="headerlink" href="#card" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Wrap the inner block in card styling. This is a simple block that just provides card styling. It is useful along with the batch block when displaying multiple items.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;card&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>blocks</strong> - the list of workflow blocks that make up the display within the card</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>

          </div>

          <div role="main" class="document" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="http://schema.org/Article">
           <div itemprop="articleBody">
             
  <section id="actions">
<h1>Actions<a class="headerlink" href="#actions" title="Link to this heading"></a></h1>
<p>Use the Actions block to add a row of buttons for one or more sub-tasks.</p>
<section id="default-config">
<h2>Default config<a class="headerlink" href="#default-config" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;actions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;buttons&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Action&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;color&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabledGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabled&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="supported-properties">
<h2>Supported properties<a class="headerlink" href="#supported-properties" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>buttons</strong> (array) - the list of buttons. Each button in the list has the following properties:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>label</strong> (string) - the text for the button label</p></li>
<li><p><strong>id</strong> (string) - the unique identifier for the button</p></li>
<li><p><strong>color</strong> (string) - passed as the “color” attribute to the material button. Use one of the supported
Material color values, such as “primary”, “warn”, “accent”. Leave as “default” to use the default button styling for a plain button.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>enabledGetter</strong> (string) - A value from the state or context. Based on this value, it generates an “enabled” property on the button.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>The button will be shown as disabled (greyed out) or enabled accordingly. The default value of this property is <cite>true</cite>. After
the block is loaded, it will automatically add a property to the block json: <cite>“enabled”: true</cite>.
If <cite>enabledGetter</cite> is set to <cite>false</cite> the automatic property will be then shown as <cite>“enabled”: false</cite>.
- <strong>valueGetters</strong> (string) - A value that will be pass as context to whichever action is being executed.
This is a JMESPath mapping.
- <strong>blocks</strong> (array) - the list of workflow items to run when this button is pressed.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="example">
<h2>Example<a class="headerlink" href="#example" title="Link to this heading"></a></h2>
<p>This example shows two buttons. The first one dispatches an asynchronous command using the
<a class="reference internal" href="dispatch.html"><span class="doc">Event Dispatch</span></a> bloc, the second one does nothing, but includes an <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">init</span></code>
block in order to start the inner workflow so that it runs and signals completion to the outer workflow.</p>
<section id="valuegetters">
<h3>valueGetters<a class="headerlink" href="#valuegetters" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>In this example, we are specifying which flow to load when the button is clicked. We do so using the <cite>valueGetters</cite> property and specifying an <cite>adapter</cite> and a <cite>workflowId</cite>.
You can find this example on the <cite>Flow Cloud &lt;https://app.kendra.io/workflowCloud/listWorkflows&gt;</cite>, in the list of workflows.</p>
<p>}</p>
</section>
<section id="enabledgetter">
<h3>enabledGetter<a class="headerlink" href="#enabledgetter" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p><cite>enabledGetter</cite> determines if the button is enabled or disabled. This is mostly referring to the UI of the button.
If the button is disabled, it will be displayed as greyed out and it will not be clickable.
<cite>enabledGetter</cite> requires a JMESPath mapping value that should return <cite>true</cite> or <cite>false</cite>.
The value can be added manually or taken from the state or the context.
In this example we want to display two different buttons, one enabled and another disabled.
To do so we take values we have saved in the state and assign them to the <cite>enabledGetter</cite> property.</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;actions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;buttons&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Visible&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;color&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[],</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabledGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;state.global.enabled&quot;</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Disabled&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;color&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;default&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[],</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabledGetter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;state.global.disabled&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="nt">&quot;enabled&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>After the block as loaded, the <cite>enabled</cite> property will be set on the button:
.. code-block:: json</p>
<blockquote>
<div><dl>
<dt>{</dt><dd><blockquote>
<div><p>“type”: “actions”,
“buttons”: [</p>
<blockquote>
<div><dl class="simple">
<dt>{</dt><dd><p>“label”: “Visible”,
“color”: “default”,
“blocks”: [],
“enabledGetter”: “state.global.enabled”,
“enabled”: true</p>
</dd>
</dl>
<p>},
{</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>“label”: “Disabled”,
“color”: “default”,
“blocks”: [],
“enabledGetter”: “state.global.disabled”,
“enabled”: false</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>}</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>]</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>}</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</div></blockquote>
</section>
<section id="alternative-blocks">
<h3>Alternative blocks<a class="headerlink" href="#alternative-blocks" title="Link to this heading"></a></h3>
<p>For external links, the <a class="reference internal" href="template.html"><span class="doc">Template Block</span></a> can be used to create links using a subset of HTML, though it is not style as a button by default.</p>
<p>For links to other Flows, the <a class="reference internal" href="link_action_block.html"><span class="doc">Link Action Block</span></a> allows opening links in another window or tab, with only one block needed, which is styled as a button (just like an Actions block).</p>
</section>
</section>
</section>

<li class="toctree-l2"><a class="reference internal" href="#parseqs">18. parseQs</a></li>

<li class="toctree-l2"><a class="reference internal" href="#debug">20. debug</a></li>
<li class="toctree-l2"><a class="reference internal" href="#json">21. json</a></li>
<li class="toctree-l2"><a class="reference internal" href="#markdown">22. markdown</a></li>

</ul>
</li>
